title: salix × syntriandra
intro: Salix × syntriandra is a rare, hybrid willow plant that is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the black willow (Salix nigra). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its salicin content. The health benefits of Salix × syntriandra include its use as a natural remedy for relieving headaches, fever, and rheumatic pain, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease and lower blood pressure. Salix × syntriandra is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and can also be used to make a tincture or salve for topical application.
